APPLICATIONS NOW OPEN – NOTTS TALENT LIVE 2026!🌟
Have you got what it takes to be the first year winner of Notts Talent Live 2026 and WIN a fantastic £500 CASH PRIZE plus other AMAZING Prizes!

Applications are OPEN for anyone that has talent across the UK. We’d love to see it!

If you think you’ve got an amazing talent that our celebrities judges NEED to see, what are you waiting for?

APPLY NOW: https://form.jotform.com/261022571081042

This year we are also proud to be raising money for Lincs & Notts Air Ambulance.

Last Date for Applications: 23:00pm on Sunday 3rd May 2026.

Follow Notts Talent Live for updates and application details.

items.text:
👗 **FITTING MODEL WANTED – Size 38** 👗
📍 Berlin-Charlottenburg

You’re a size 38 and curious what really happens behind the scenes of a fashion brand?
Join our fitting sessions and be part of how our collections come to life. 🙌✨

✨ **What you’ll do**
• Try on new styles together with our product team 👚
• Give honest feedback on fit, comfort & feel 💬
• Help us perfect our collections before launch 🎯
→ No shootings, no runway – just real product work 🚫📸

📏 **Your measurements (approx.)**
• Height: 168 cm (±4 cm)
• Bust: 88 cm (±2 cm)
• Waist: 73 cm (±2 cm)
• Hips: 98 cm (±2 cm)

🕒 **The setup**
• 2x per week, approx. 3h per session ⏰
• Monday–Friday (daytime) 📅
• Freelance, mini-job or working student 💼

📩 **How to apply**
Send an email to job@legerbylenagercke.com with:
1️⃣ Photos (front / side / back) in fitted top & leggings 📸
2️⃣ Your current measurements 📐
3️⃣ A few lines about yourself & your availability ✍️

🔗 [https://www.legerbylenagercke.com/pages/karriere](https://www.legerbylenagercke.com/pages/karriere)
items.previewDescription: LeGer by Lena Gercke is a Berlin-based fashion brand that empowers women through fashion and builds an inspiring and supportive community.

Liebe Filmemacher & Schauspieler, 

Von "Wilde Kerle" hin zu der Eigenproduktion "Späti" in ZDF. Wilson Gonzalez Ochsenknecht versucht gerade den Sprung vom Schauspieler hin zum Producer. Wie gut das gelingt/gelingen kann und wie das Netzwerk dahinter aussieht...seht ihr hier!

items.text:
**Mroczne sesje**

 

Poszukuje kobiet w **wieku od 18**, górna granica nie ma znaczenia. Wykonuje sesje w stylu mrocznym wykorzystując różne gadżety i kostiumy. Szukam kobiet ,które nie boją się własnego ciała. Doświadczenie nie jest tu ważne.

Osoba zainteresowana powinna najlepiej mieszkać **w Gliwicach** lub okolicach ( Zabrze, Katowice chyba, że ktoś jest bardzo zainteresowany i mieszka dalej to też ok. z tym,że nie zwracam za bilety.) tak aby dojazd był krótki dla niej. Sesje wykonuje tylko w Gliwicach. Po sesji i obrobieniu zdjęć, zostaną one wysłane modelce do jej wykorzystania. **Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne**, umowa na zasadzie **TFP**

** **

**Zapraszam na stronę Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia i maxmodel lukus_wielki2**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.text:
Do majowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzny roli:

Menel 1 (40-50) - mocno zaniedbany, pijany/otumaniony, bardziej pasywny (półleży na ławce). 

Data: 05. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania pilnych zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
**Projektuję wnętrza i buduję marki, które wyróżniają. 🎬✨**

Cześć! Wchodzę w barter: mój design za Twój hardware. 💻🎨

Niezależnie od tego, czy dopiero budujesz swoje portfolio, czy prowadzisz już zaawansowane produkcje i potrzebujesz profesjonalnego workspace’u oraz spójnego brandingu – mam coś dla Ciebie. Łączę dwa światy: architekturę wnętrz i identyfikację wizualną.

**Co oferuję w zamian za sprzęt?**

✅ **Kompleksowy branding / odświeżenie wizerunku:** 

Twoja marka osobista musi oddawać jakość Twoich produkcji. Zaprojektuję spójną identyfikację, która wyróżni Cię w branży video.

✅ **Projekt metamorfozy i funkcjonalnego workspace’u:** 

Studio pod montaż i color grading wymaga specyficznego podejścia do oświetlenia i ergonomii. Zaprojektuję przemeblowanie Twojego biura tak, by praca była czystą przyjemnością.

✅ **Strategię wizualną:** 

Pomogę Ci stworzyć wizerunek, który przyciągnie Twoich wymarzonych klientów i pozwoli Ci wyjść z cienia.

**Zasady? Gramy czysto:** 

Wiem, że mój profil może wydawać się anonimowy, dlatego zależy mi na pełnym komforcie obu stron. Chętnie poznam się bliżej (video-call, kawa w Warszawie, LinkedIn). Możemy spisać klasyczną umowę barterową, skorzystać z escrow lub umówić się na "uścisk dłoni".

**Szukam (szczegóły na grafikach):** 

🚀 Procesory Ryzen 7/9 lub Intel i7/i9. 🚀 RAM 32GB/64GB (DDR4/DDR5). 🚀 Karty graficzne RTX / szybkie dyski NVMe M.2.

Masz zbędny sprzęt, a czujesz, że Twój wizerunek lub studio potrzebują zmiany? 

**Zapraszam na priv – pogadajmy o Twoim nowym flow!** ☕️

#BarterIT #MontazWideo #ColorGrading #VideoEditor #Branding #ArchitekturaWnetrz #FreelanceVideo #HardwareExchange

Twoja marka osobista musi oddawać jakość Twoich produkcji. Zaprojektuję spójną identyfikację, która wyróżni Cię w branży video.

✅ **Projekt metamorfozy i funkcjonalnego workspace’u:** 

Studio pod montaż i color grading wymaga specyficznego podejścia do oświetlenia i ergonomii. Zaprojektuję przemeblowanie Twojego biura tak, by praca była czystą przyjemnością.

✅ **Strategię wizualną:** 

Pomogę Ci stworzyć wizerunek, który przyciągnie Twoich wymarzonych klientów i pozwoli Ci wyjść z cienia.

**Zasady? Gramy czysto:** 

Wiem, że mój profil może wydawać się anonimowy, dlatego zależy mi na pełnym komforcie obu stron. Chętnie poznam się bliżej (video-call, kawa w Warszawie, LinkedIn). Możemy spisać klasyczną umowę barterową, skorzystać z escrow lub umówić się na "uścisk dłoni".

**Szukam (szczegóły na grafikach):** 

🚀 Procesory Ryzen 7/9 lub Intel i7/i9. 🚀 RAM 32GB/64GB (DDR4/DDR5). 🚀 Karty graficzne RTX / szybkie dyski NVMe M.2.

Masz zbędny sprzęt, a czujesz, że Twój wizerunek lub studio potrzebują zmiany? 

**Zapraszam na priv – pogadajmy o Twoim nowym flow!** ☕️

#BarterIT #MontazWideo #ColorGrading #VideoEditor #Branding #ArchitekturaWnetrz #FreelanceVideo #HardwareExchange

PAID OPPORTUNITY- MANCHESTER CASTING 

We’re looking for confident actors and actresses based in Yorkshire to feature in social media shoots for a fast-growing viral marketing agency.
( Blank Viral) 

🎬 Paid Opportunities Available

Ideal candidates:

* Comfortable and confident in front of the camera

* Able to deliver natural, engaging performances for short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, etc.)

* Open to creative direction and experimenting with different concepts

This is a great opportunity to build your portfolio, gain exposure, and be part of high-performing viral campaigns.

Interested? Get in touch with your portfolio/showreel and availability.

items.text:
Shamanic, Physical Theatre Workshop - London, 22nd May
Hi All, I'm running KINSHIP - a low-cost day workshop for actors and performers who are interested in learning a shamanic approach to physical theatre and ensemble work. Lots of play, lots of connection, uplifting dance, rhythm exercises and movement-based storytelling.  

Link to Facebook Event:  https://fb.me/e/49UwDbf9X

22nd May, London SE23 - 10:30am - 3:30pm - £25.00. 

To book, please email: ros@rosalindparker.co.uk

COST 25.00 מי Friday, 22nd May, 2026 SDH Space, 9 Havelock Walk, Forest Hill, London, SE23 3HG 10:30am- 3:30 Please note: Some parts of this workshop will be filmed for promotional purposes. to BOK: PLEASE EMAIL ros@rosalindparker.co.uk More info: www.rosalindparker.couk/worksh‎'‎‎

topComments.text: It’s wasting peoples time and your own time  when you don’t put essential details such as gender, role, style, etc

What is the role? The project? How long is the shoot? How much are you paying? These are crucial before people know whether they fit your brief and whether they want to apply..paid can mean anything.. £20/£200/£2000.. people need to know it may be worth their while before applying. Thanks

🎬 OGŁOSZENIE – STATYŚCI DO NOWEGO SERIALU 🎬

Do nowego współczesnego serialu poszukujemy statystów do sceny rozgrywanej w pubie.

📅 Terminy zdjęć: 5 i 6 maja  
🕐 Zbiórki: około godziny 13:00  
🌗 Zdjęcia: dzienno-nocne  
📍 Lokalizacja: okolice Puszczy Kampinoskiej  

💰 Stawka:  
– 340 zł za dwa dni zdjęciowe (płatne drugiego dnia)  
– 400 zł łącznie dla osób, które przyjadą samochodem i zabiorą minimum 3 osoby (płatne drugiego dnia)

🚗 Mile widziane osoby zmotoryzowane

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
dorota.kamedstudio@gmail.com  
Temat wiadomości: „5-6 maja”

Jeśli możesz być dostępny/a tylko jednego dnia, koniecznie zaznacz to w zgłoszeniu.  
(Pierwszeństwo mają osoby dyspozycyjne przez oba dni.)

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:
– imię i nazwisko  
– numer telefonu  
– miejsce zamieszkania  
– wiek  
– wzrost  
– rozmiar ubrania  
– 2 aktualne zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka)

Zapraszamy do współpracy! 🎥

**WARSZAWA**

**30 kwietnia (czwartek)**

** **

*Proszę o nie zgłaszanie się panów, którzy już wysłali zgłoszenie*.

** **

Doszukujemy jeszcze panów na plan filmu "Kosmonauta" na 30.04. Wiek od 18 lat w górę bez ograniczeń.

 

**Stawka 200 zł gotówką po planie (dzień zdjęciowy 130 zł + charakteryzacja 70 zł)**

** **

Charakteryzacja dzisiaj 27.04 i jutro 28.04. Na strzyżenie są zapraszane tylko wybrane osoby.

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS 30**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie) i sylwetki: TYLKO Z DNIA ZGŁOSZENIA + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

@wszyscy

items.title: 🔥New Actors🔥

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LIVERPOOL & NORTH WEST (UK) based actors only 

Feature Film: One Man’s Land

📖 ABOUT THE FILM

One Man’s Land follows Harry, a disgraced war veteran returning home after serving time for war crimes committed during his final tour in Afghanistan.

He struggles to rebuild his life in a place that no longer feels familiar. His father is in prison, his mother has passed and his sister wants nothing to do with him. When he reconnects with an old comrade, Ken, he is drawn into a fringe far-right political movement that feeds his anger and disillusionment.

At the same time, Harry forms a fragile connection with Ruth, one of the few people who sees beyond his past.

Despite his best efforts to balance his personal feelings and his distorted views, Harry’s decisions lead him down a path of no return.

🎥 PROJECT DETAILS

• Feature film (low-budget, high-quality production)
• Flexible shoot schedule across multiple months
• Filming in Merseyside
• Non-union project
• Paid roles (flat fee, negotiated)
• Professional crew using industry-standard equipment

🎬 Auditions: May
📍 SAE Institute, Georgia House, Pall Mall, Liverpool L3 6AL
🚆 Nearest station: Moorfields

⚠️ Important
This film includes mature themes and strong language, including racist rhetoric reflective of certain characters.

🎭 ROLES

HARRY (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Former Afghan veteran. Physically fit, rough around the edges. Quiet but volatile.
Lead role with strong emotional range.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

RUTH (Mid 30s – Early 40s)
North-West accent. Barmaid with a hidden past. Warm, likeable, emotionally guarded.
⚠️ Includes two scenes involving kissing (a peck and a brief intimate moment). An intimacy coordinator will be present.

LAURA (Late 20s – Early 30s)
North-West accent. Harry’s ex. Direct, hardened, not interested in reconnecting.

BARB (Mid – Late 50s)
North-West accent. Reclusive mother grieving her son. Approx. 1 shoot day.

PETE GOLD (Late 40s – Mid 50s)
British accent. Charismatic but manipulative far-right leader.
⚠️ Contains inflammatory dialogue reflective of the character.

ALICE (Early – Mid 20s)
North-West accent. Harry’s sister. Caring but distant. Has moved on.

DR AVERY (Mid 30s+)
Preferably female. Court-appointed therapist. Professional, empathetic.

📌 REQUIREMENTS
• Headshot
• Showreel

📩 Apply: onemanslandfilm@gmail.com

items.text:
🎭 ACTORS — TEXT DEVELOPMENT OPPORTUNITY (PRETORIA + ONLINE)
Vlyt Art Acting is developing a new stage adaptation of De Nieuwe Ridderorde (1832) — widely regarded as South Africa’s first play.

A satirical comedy set in the Cape Colony, where a group of “Temperance Knights” preach morality in public… while privately doing the opposite.

When an outsider enters their circle, the hypocrisy begins to unravel.

⸻

💡 WHY THIS PROJECT

This is not a revival.
This is a live development process.

We’re working with:
– Newly adapted text
– South African character types
– A play rarely explored in a contemporary performance context

This is for actors who want to:
– Work with unperformed / developing material
– Be part of shaping a script from the ground up
– Engage with satire, language, and character in process

⸻

🎭 BONIFACE DEVELOPMENT LAB
Presented by Vlyt Art Acting

A weekly text lab where actors:

– Read and test new scenes
– Explore character, action, and language
– Work with unfinished, evolving material
– Contribute to shaping a performable script

This is not rehearsal for a finished production.
This is where the production begins.

⸻

📍 FORMAT

– In-person (Pretoria — curated)
– Online (application-based)

🗓 Starts: Weekend of 8–9 May (weekly)

⸻

👥 WHO THIS IS FOR

Actors who:
– Are curious and collaborative
– Want to work on process, not just product
– Are comfortable with evolving material

⸻

📩 APPLY HERE
https://forms.gle/Xdtiof1BziSTGWZG9

items.summary:
🎭 ACTORS — TEXT DEVELOPMENT OPPORTUNITY (PRETORIA + ONLINE)
Vlyt Art Acting is developing a new stage adaptation of De Nieuwe Ridderorde (1832) — widely regarded as South Africa’s first play.

A satirical comedy set in the Cape Colony, where a group of “Temperance Knights” preach morality in public… while privately doing the opposite.

When an outsider enters their circle, the hypocrisy begins to unravel.

⸻

💡 WHY THIS PROJECT

This is not a revival.
This is a live development process.

We’re working with:
– Newly adapted text
– South African character types
– A play rarely explored in a contemporary performance context

This is for actors who want to:
– Work with unperformed / developing material
– Be part of shaping a script from the ground up
– Engage with satire, language, and character in process

⸻

🎭 BONIFACE DEVELOPMENT LAB
Presented by Vlyt Art Acting

A weekly text lab where actors:

– Read and test new scenes
– Explore character, action, and language
– Work with unfinished, evolving material
– Contribute to shaping a performable script

This is not rehearsal for a finished production.
This is where the production begins.

⸻

📍 FORMAT

– In-person (Pretoria — curated)
– Online (application-based)

🗓 Starts: Weekend of 8–9 May (weekly)

⸻

👥 WHO THIS IS FOR

Actors who:
– Are curious and collaborative
– Want to work on process, not just product
– Are comfortable with evolving material

⸻

📩 APPLY HERE
https://forms.gle/Xdtiof1BziSTGWZG9

items.text:
Producer: Casting Call – Lead Male Role for Indie Feature (June Shoot)

We are currently casting for an independent feature film shooting this June and are seeking a talented actor for a key role.
Role: Male Lead
Age Range: 30–40
Ethnicity/Look: Middle Eastern or similar appearance
Project Details:
This is an indie feature film with a character-driven story and strong dramatic elements. Filming is scheduled for June, with rehearsals beginning within the next few days.
Requirements:
• Strong acting experience (film or theatre)
• Availability for rehearsals on short notice
• Full availability during the June shooting schedule
• Ability to collaborate closely with director and cast
Location: london
To Apply:
Please submit your headshot, resume, and a show reel (if available) to au.filmstudios@gmail.com. Include “Female Lead Casting – Indie Feature” in the subject line.
We are looking for someone committed, versatile, and ready to bring depth to a compelling role. We look forward to seeing your submissions.
Best regards,
Edilberto Restino [Zero 1 Films & AU Films Production]
[au.filmstudios@gmail.com]

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM **

**ROLE: BOB**
Male, White, Late 50s–early 60s

Bob is a traditional, working-class American husband. He’s emotionally detached, habit-driven, and comfortably unaware of his wife’s inner life. 

He is not overtly cruel—his neglect is casual, ingrained, and almost invisible. His humor is dry, dismissive, and occasionally biting without realizing the impact. There’s a subtle humanity underneath, but it rarely surfaces.

**Tone/Performance Notes:**
* Naturalistic, grounded performance (not caricature)
* Strong sense of timing for dark comedy
* Ability to play obliviousness with authenticity
* Minimal physicality; performance is largely internal and reactive

**Project Details:**
* Short film (dark comedy / psychological drama)
* Non-union / micro-budget (include rate if applicable)
* Filming in Los Angeles 
* Dates:TBD  late summer/ early fall

**To Submit:**
Please send headshot, resume, and reel (if available) to: Allamericandinner@gmail.com
Subject line: “BOB Submission – All American Dinner”

items.text:
Due to unforseen circumstances we are recasting for our tour of the children’s theatre show, “Tom Gates Live”, based on the popular book series by Liz Pichon.

The show is written and directed by Miranda Larson with songs and music by Barrie Bignold and is produced by Mark Thompson at MT Productions.

Production dates:

Tour dates June – Oct 2026. We are currently have 35 dates over this period. 

This production will be based around London so the successful candidate will need a base in London or the surrounding area. 

**Tom Gates (Male, 16 years - 23 years)**

Tom Gates is an easily distracted and creative 10-year-old boy who loves doodling, listening to music, and annoying his older sister, Delia.

We are looking for a musical theatre performer that can sing, perform slapstick and comedy, and can perform the role of a young boy. He needs to be strictly 5'10" tall or smaller. 

Within the show, there is basic singing, dancing and movement but nothing too technical.

 

The successful applicant will need to be comfortable assisting with the load ins/ outs and have a full UK drivers licence as they will be asked to assist driving the touring cast car.

Playing age:

16 years - 23 years

Height:

147 — 178 cm

Gender:

Male

Contract info:

Show day fee: £150

Travel day fee: £50

Subsistence: £20

Please send CV's & headshots to 

casting.mtproductions@gmail.com

items.text:
Casting for a new short film.

Velvet Waltz is co-producing a highly stylised low-budget short with a local filmmaker. Working title: **MOCKTAIL**.

Set across one cocktail bar scene, the film explores **perception vs reality** through movement, tension and atmosphere.

**Shooting in Manchester this summer. One-day shoot.**

Looking for the following roles:
* Female, 25–35 playing age — calm, controlled presence
* Female, 25–35 playing age — slim / avant garde / bohemian energy
* Male, 25–35 playing age
* Female, 30s playing age — glamour model type look
* Male, 30–40s playing age — built / muscular presence
* Male, 25–35 playing age (2 roles, one South Asian preferred)
* Male, 50s playing age — someone holding onto youth

Intentionally super low budget. Intentionally high style.

DM, comment or email: **[scripts@velvet-waltz.com](mailto:scripts@velvet-waltz.com)**

**NB:** If you already know me and are interested, but I haven’t reached out yet, drop me a WhatsApp, email, Insta message or whatever you’ve got.

items.summary:
Casting for a new short film.

Velvet Waltz is co-producing a highly stylised low-budget short with a local filmmaker. Working title: **MOCKTAIL**.

Set across one cocktail bar scene, the film explores **perception vs reality** through movement, tension and atmosphere.

**Shooting in Manchester this summer. One-day shoot.**

Looking for the following roles:
* Female, 25–35 playing age — calm, controlled presence
* Female, 25–35 playing age — slim / avant garde / bohemian energy
* Male, 25–35 playing age
* Female, 30s playing age — glamour model type look
* Male, 30–40s playing age — built / muscular presence
* Male, 25–35 playing age (2 roles, one South Asian preferred)
* Male, 50s playing age — someone holding onto youth

Intentionally super low budget. Intentionally high style.

DM, comment or email: **[scripts@velvet-waltz.com](mailto:scripts@velvet-waltz.com)**

**NB:** If you already know me and are interested, but I haven’t reached out yet, drop me a WhatsApp, email, Insta message or whatever you’ve got.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - SPANISH ACTRESSES
Hi, I’m Lucia, a Spanish film student in Berlin, planning my upcoming bachelor project, and I’m looking for a two Spanish actresses to collaborate with.

ABOUT THE FILM:

‘Las cosas se mueven en mi casa’ (‘Things are moving in my house’) is a B.A. graduation short film directed by Lucía Gil (www.luciagildp.com). It stems from the feeling of ‘in-betweenness’ that a young Spanish woman feels in Berlin - not fully feeling at home in Germany, but losing the anchor to her Spanish family, as she spends more time apart from them.

ABOUT THE ROLES:

- Abril (main role): 20-28 y/o

- Pilar (Abril’s mother): 50-70 y/o

NATIVE SPANISH IS REQUIRED.

PROJECT INFOS:

Shooting dates: 2-3 days between 1st-11th June

This is a no-budget student film, unpaid. 

Food and drinks will be provided on set, as well as good vibes 🙂

The film will be submitted to festivals.

If you are interested in one of the roles, please text me ! luciagilsuarez@gmail.com or @filmbylusi (ig).🫶🏼

items.text:
I posted a few months back looking for advice moving forward with my son who is neurodivergent. Thanks to everyone’s advice we are now in acting classes, also my son in a specialised acting school. He’s doing theatre.  Both done short films (he got lead role) and played as featured extras in 2 credited movies for cinema release this year, also some promo work . 
Loving what we are doing and how things are going right now . So firstly wanted to see what people thought our acting age range would be. I’m 47 Dylan is 26 now. So I know what to apply for . Also  if there was any credited roles coming up I’m ready to try step into small roles but happy to do featured extra at minute if it is credited . And any more advice at this stage is welcomed, as I’m new just starting out 
Thank you

items.text:
Casting for new talent
Hi, I am starting a video/filmmaking business and putting together COMEDY samples for Youtube and to promote the business.

I need actors, comedians for a few simple scenes.  No experience required (although helpful).  Must be professional and reliable. 

1. To play a wild pharmacist.  Male or female talent.  Ages 25-45 Should be corporate looking with an edge, such as wild hair, tattoos, etc.   
2. To play a comedy Lucifer character.  Male or female.  Prefer age 30-50  The wilder looking and more evil you can appear, the better.  Must have a sense of humor.

I will probably need 20-40 minutes of your time.  This is a great way to get some experience and start your acting career.

No pay, but you will get copy of the video, stills photos, credit and experience.

You can email a few photos and information to 1allancastle@gmail.com  

Thank you.  Allan

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – Between Two Lives
An Independent Short Film

A Solkem Studios Film

        Hello,

I’m currently casting for my upcoming short film Between Two Lives, a character-driven story exploring identity, growth, and the tension between past and future. This is my second film project, and I’m looking for actors who are passionate about storytelling and want to collaborate on a meaningful project.

      MARCUS (Supporting Role)

Male, mids–late 20s

Charismatic, outgoing, natural comedic presence

Represents comfort and familiarity in Jordan’s lifestyle

Strong in group scenes and natural dialogue delivery

  ANDRE (Supporting Role)

Male, mid–late 20s

Calm, grounded, observant presence

Delivers lines with subtle emotional depth

Represents clarity and truth within the friend group

📍 Filming Location: Aurora & Denver, Colorado

📅 Shoot Dates: July 10–12, 2026

🎬 Production: Independent Film

💰 Compensation: Will provide food/snack/Drinks: This is an unpaid project, created for:

🎥 Credit:

On-screen credit

IMDb credit

Copy of the final film for your reel

📩 To Submit:

Headshot

Reel or past work (if available)

Contact information

📧 Email: reinesolkem101@gmail.com

📱 Phone: 720-572-0029

Looking for actors who are serious, reliable, and excited to help bring a strong story to life.

items.text:
## ** CASTING CALL – MADDIE (LEAD)**

**Project: Short-form legal comedy web series**
**Location: Denver**
**Compensation: Unpaid (strong reel footage, recurring role)**
**Shoot Dates: [July / flexible]**

** MADDIE (Lead / Recurring)**

**Female, mid-20s to late 30s **

Confident, expressive, and just slightly unhinged.

Maddie is a lawyer who doesn’t quite *act* like one. She says absurd things with total conviction.. Think *Legally Blonde energy*—but less polished, more chaotic.

Charming. Unpredictable. Fully believes her own logic—even when it makes no sense.

To submit:

- Headshot (or recent photo)

- Short clip (if you have one) OR quick intro video

DM me.

sharedPost.text:
Started as a student with nothing but a dream…

These pictures are not just memories — they are a journey.

From the days I wasn’t strong yet, still learning, still searching for my style…
to now, where BONES is becoming something real 🦴⚡

It wasn’t easy.
No money. No fame. Just passion and consistency.

Swipe and watch the transformation…
because this is not just photos — it’s proof that something is possible.

The journey continues. 🔥

#Boneless #BonesDance #Transformation #GlowUp #FromNothing

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL

Purple Dreams Productions are casting the lead character in our upcoming play.

‘MURDER AT…’
There’s a killer in the cast! Comedy turns to tragedy as a murderer reveals themselves… but who will be their first victim?

This play is a psychological drama, based around a cast of actors as they put on a series of plays at their local theatre. 

We have 2 booked dates locked in at different venues, with the potential for more as new bookings come in.

29th May - Murder at the Quay Theatre
13th June - Murder at Cheltenham Playhouse

We’ve previously toured this play in Brentwood, Faversham, Lowestoft, Sittingbourne, Wickenby, Thame and Sleaford to great responses, and are looking forward to taking it to new audiences. 

Rehearsals will take place in Hunstanton (PE36) and will be as flexible as possible to work around previous commitments.

If you’re interested in joining our warm and friendly group, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. Contact me via a DM on here, or at purple-dreams@hotmail.co.uk 

Many thanks 
Tobias Nicholls 
Creative Director 
Purple Dreams Productions

items.title: URGENT CASTING CALL

items.text:
Hey everyone!
My name is Sophie and I’m casting for an upcoming indie horror film and looking for two female main characters! 

I am looking for: 

Diane 

- 19-25 age range 

- Ambitious carer character 

- Any appearance welcomed 

- Happy for SFX makeup to be applied 🙂 

Franny

- 19-25 age range 

- Agoraphobic young adult character 

- Any appearance welcomed 

- Happy for SFX makeup to be applied 🙂 

Looking for actresses who would be available within the next few weeks to shoot! On some evenings and in the days! 

I’m looking for people around Colchester/Essex/Elmstead Market! 

Unfortunately, this project has no budget and is a indie collaboration project, therefore only suits actresses who are looking for showreel footage/experience, sorry 😞

It’ll be a really fun horror project, with a hope to submit to festivals! 

Please email sophiebrock3@hotmail.com for more info about the project and with a headshot of yours! 

Thanks again guys!! :)

items.title: Hey everyone!

sharedPost.text:
Hello everyone!

**Location: Poland, Lublin**

Exhibition **June 6-7**

I'm looking for **actors** for a performance. A** slim woman of any age**, preferably an actress with no allergies to body paint.

Terms: **TFP**

This isn't a commercial art project. In exchange for participating, I can take a few professional, classic photos for your portfolio for free.

Examples of past performances from my exhibitions can be found in the attached photos.

items.text:
**Warszawa. Szukamy statystów / aktorów do nagrania w studiu podcastowym**

Nagranie bez dźwięku. Chcemy zrealizować ujęcia, na których będziesz odgrywać nagranie podcastu/vloga w stylu „gadającej głowy”.

Szukamy osób o wizerunku eksperta, blogera lub coacha (ok. 30–40 lat).

Mile widziana możliwość zabrania kilku stylizacji i przebrania się.

Materiał zostanie wykorzystany w reklamie oraz materiałach promocyjnych studia w mediach społecznościowych.

Do 4 godzin nagrań.
Data do ustalenia.

Prosimy o przesyłanie zdjęć/wideo oraz oczekiwanej stawki w wiadomości prywatne.

items.text:
**OGŁOSZENIE – POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI DO FILMU STUDENCKIEGO (HORROR)**

Szukamy statystów do udziału w krótkometrażowym filmie studenckim z gatunku horror. Akcja filmu rozgrywa się w klubie, dlatego zależy nam na osobach, które swobodnie czują się w klimacie imprezowym i nie boją się mroczniejszej atmosfery na planie. Projekt jest non-profit.

📍 **Plan zdjęciowy:** **3 dni (21-23.05.2026)**
– 2 dni zdjęciowe w ciągu dnia (21 i 22.05, od rana do wieczora)

– 1 dzień zdjęciowy w nocy (23.05, od 21 do rana)

🎭 **Kogo szukamy?**
Osób w każdym wieku i każdej płci (mile widziane 18+). Nie wymagamy doświadczenia aktorskiego!

🎬 **Co oferujemy?**
– udział w ciekawym projekcie filmowym
– zdobycie doświadczenia na planie
– świetną atmosferę i współpracę z młodą ekipą filmową

Jeśli masz ochotę przeżyć coś nietypowego i stać się częścią filmu rozgrywającego się w klubowym klimacie – zgłoś się!

📩 Prosimy zgłaszać się w formularzu: [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScd7x-KM9fQ0lofievcq1fo9nxeaTU6HdnUUWQEKhoSYS-KSw/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=116928550384641524045](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScd7x-KM9fQ0lofievcq1fo9nxeaTU6HdnUUWQEKhoSYS-KSw/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=116928550384641524045)

sharedPost.text:
SCRIPT WORK -An Actors Gym.
Practice cold read and improvisation, bringing a short scene to life and learning tools to make self tapes get noticed! 
Practice is everything and playing is how we learn…. What’s not to love?
 
Dates/times are Tuesdays 11-2, Audition house,

5/12/19/26th May

£80 for four week course

Email me hello@meisnerlondon.com

#actortraining #selftapemay #actingcoach #meisnertechnique #meisnerinstitutelondon 

Yayssssss!

sharedPost.text:
Next Level Acting...Next Level You

Three days. One technique. No limits.

The Meisner Technique is one of the most powerful acting methods in the world — and this June, we’re bringing it to Central London.
Meisner Foundation Course

📅 8, 9 & 10 June
🕐 11am – 3pm
📍 Central London

Three days. Twelve hours. A completely new relationship with your craft.
DM us or email hello@meisnerlondon.com to secure your place.
#MeisnerTechnique #ActingLondon #LondonActors #ActingWorkshop #Meisner ActingTraining TheatreLondon

items.text:
PAID OPPORTUNITY- MANCHESTER CASTING 

We’re looking for confident actors and actresses based in Yorkshire to feature in social media shoots for a fast-growing viral marketing agency.
( Blank Viral) 

🎬 Paid Opportunities Available

Ideal candidates:

* Comfortable and confident in front of the camera

* Able to deliver natural, engaging performances for short-form content (TikTok, Instagram Reels, etc.)

* Open to creative direction and experimenting with different concepts

This is a great opportunity to build your portfolio, gain exposure, and be part of high-performing viral campaigns.

Interested? Get in touch with your portfolio/showreel and availability.

Join us at the iconic BFI, Stephen Street, for a full day of screenings, hands-on workshops, and unbeatable networking with fellow creatives and select industry guests. https://www.littleflixlondonfilmfestival.com/events-1

🎬 Tickets from just £11–£35 https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/little-flix-london-film-festival-the-bfi-tickets-1986341913133?aff=ebdsshcopyurl&utm-campaign=social&utm-content=attendeeshare&utm-medium=discovery&utm-term=organizer-profile&utm-share-source=organizer-profile

Don’t miss out—this is where film, creativity, and opportunity come together.

Follow for updates @LittleFlix

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — OneTigris Brand Video Production**

We're shooting a 2-day commercial video campaign for **OneTigris** (onetigris.com), a leading tactical outdoor gear brand, and we're looking for talented on-camera performers in the **Los Angeles area**!

📅 **Shoot Days: May 2 & May 3** — you must be available for BOTH days to apply.

**🟠 ROLE 1 — MAIN TALENT (Male)** 📋 1 spot | Mid-20s to mid-30s | Paid
* Primary on-camera presence across all brand videos
* Must be comfortable and confident on camera
* Capable of handling tactical/outdoor gear scenes
* Athletic, active look that fits an outdoor lifestyle brand
* Commercial or brand experience a plus

⏱ **May 2:** Full day (~10 hrs) | **May 3:** Partial day (~6 hrs) 💰 **Rate: $300 per half-day**

**🟠 ROLE 2 — SUPPORTING TALENT (Female)** 📋 1 spot | Mid-20s to mid-30s | Paid
* Background and supporting roles (gym, security, lifestyle scenes)
* Split-screen and contrast shots with main talent
* Hand model shots featuring gear and accessories
* Pickup and coverage footage
* Easygoing, versatile, collaborative on set

⏱ **May 2:** Partial day (~6–8 hrs) | **May 3:** Partial day (~3–4 hrs) 💰 **Rate: $200 per half-day**

**🟠 Background Performers** 1–2 additional background performers may be needed. 💰 **Rate: $200 per half-day**

⚠️ **Please only apply if you are available for BOTH May 2 and May 3.** We are unable to accommodate partial availability for these roles.

**📩 TO APPLY, email casting@rarefloweragency.com:** 

✔ Your name & contact info 

✔ 2–3 recent photos (including one full-body) 

✔ Brief bio or any on-camera/commercial experience 

✔ Confirmation that you're available May 2 & 3

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL

Purple Dreams Productions are casting the lead character in our upcoming play.

‘MURDER AT…’
There’s a killer in the cast! Comedy turns to tragedy as a murderer reveals themselves… but who will be their first victim?

This play is a psychological drama, based around a cast of actors as they put on a series of plays at their local theatre. 

We have 2 booked dates locked in at different venues, with the potential for more as new bookings come in.

29th May - Murder at the Quay Theatre
13th June - Murder at Cheltenham Playhouse

We’ve previously toured this play in Brentwood, Faversham, Lowestoft, Sittingbourne, Wickenby, Thame and Sleaford to great responses, and are looking forward to taking it to new audiences. 

Rehearsals will take place in Hunstanton (PE36) and will be as flexible as possible to work around previous commitments.

If you’re interested in joining our warm and friendly group, please don’t hesitate to get in touch. Contact me via a DM on here, or at purple-dreams@hotmail.co.uk 

Many thanks 
Tobias Nicholls 
Creative Director 
Purple Dreams Productions

items.text:
BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED - NON UNION CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for **NON UNION ACTORS **to be *background cast* in our project which will be filming on **MAY 20. **Exact call times for background cast is TBD however, we would need you to keep your entire day available until the exact times are confirmed.

The background cast are bar patrons who are seated in the bar. 

The background we are looking for:

-any ethnicity

-non-union

-available all day on May 20th 2026

The deadline for submissions to our email is **May 04** **2026** @ 11:59PM.

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to go method. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

Please provide your introduction of who you are, headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email.

Please send your information to our email: **methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com **and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please note that this set will be **unpaid** however, crafty will be on set. You are still expected to bring your own lunch as crafty is not substitute for a meal. We hope to hear from you :)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – VANCOUVER - PAID
We’re currently casting for a Kickstarter commercial shoot and looking for:

• Male talent (right-handed preferred)

• Comfortable working with hands-on tools on camera

• Natural, confident presence on screen

📅 Shoot date: May 6

⏱ Duration: Full day (approx. 8 hours)

💰 Rate: $300/day

⸻

Project details:

We’ll be filming a craft cutting tool used for precise, hands-on work (cutting materials like leather, wood, etc.).

This is a hands-focused shoot, so it’s important that you feel comfortable performing simple cutting actions on camera.

📩 How to apply:

If you feel like you’d be a good fit, please leave a comment or send me a message with your demo reel/portfolio — I’ll share more details.

Feel free to share if you know someone who fits 🙌

I added some references of what we will be creating to provide some clarity

items.text:
Hej, chciałam podzielić się swoją opinią, żeby inni mogli podjąć świadomą decyzję. Niestety nie polecam współpracy przy tym projekcie.

Moje doświadczenie było trudne głównie ze względu na sposób pracy reżyserki/producentki – miałam wrażenie braku przygotowania do pracy z dziećmi oraz nieuwzględniania ich potrzeb. Warunki na planie również pozostawiały wiele do życzenia – było brudno, nieprzyjemnie, a zaplecze praktycznie żadne (np. wyżywienie ograniczało się do przekąsek typu chipsy).

Dodatkowo dzień zdjęciowy był bardzo długi – oczekiwano wielogodzinnej obecności (nawet do ok. 12h), co przy udziale małego dziecka jest po prostu nie w porządku. Szczególnie że większość czasu to było czekanie na jedną scenę.

Na plus: sama ekipa filmowa i aktorzy byli naprawdę w porządku i tworzyli dobrą atmosferę. Natomiast organizacyjnie i pod kątem pracy z dziećmi – zdecydowanie mam duże zastrzeżenia.

Dodatkowo po całej sytuacji zostałam zablokowana w mediach społecznościowych, a do tej pory nie mam żadnej informacji, gdzie i kiedy wizerunek mojego dziecka będzie wykorzystany. Uważam to za bardzo nieprofesjonalne podejście.

Moje doświadczenie było trudne głównie ze względu na sposób pracy reżyserki/producentki – miałam wrażenie braku przygotowania do pracy z dziećmi oraz nieuwzględniania ich potrzeb. Warunki na planie również pozostawiały wiele do życzenia – było brudno, nieprzyjemnie, a zaplecze praktycznie żadne (np. wyżywienie ograniczało się do przekąsek typu chipsy).

Dodatkowo dzień zdjęciowy był bardzo długi – oczekiwano wielogodzinnej obecności (nawet do ok. 12h), co przy udziale małego dziecka jest po prostu nie w porządku. Szczególnie że większość czasu to było czekanie na jedną scenę.

Na plus: sama ekipa filmowa i aktorzy byli naprawdę w porządku i tworzyli dobrą atmosferę. Natomiast organizacyjnie i pod kątem pracy z dziećmi – zdecydowanie mam duże zastrzeżenia.

Dodatkowo po całej sytuacji zostałam zablokowana w mediach społecznościowych, a do tej pory nie mam żadnej informacji, gdzie i kiedy wizerunek mojego dziecka będzie wykorzystany. Uważam to za bardzo nieprofesjonalne podejście.

items.text:
Heja, 

Może są tutaj osoby które mają przestrzeń w majówkę na casting. 

Zaczynamy casting do reklamy sieci sklepów. 

**SZUKAMY: **

1. **Chłopak - normals **- w wieku 18-24 lata - może mieć urodę typu boy next door. NIepozorny, może być lekko nieśmiały. 
2. **sportowiec - **22-35 lat - typ mięśniaka - lubi atencję i lubi się popisywać - dobrze aby był sprawny fizycznie. Mile widziane jeśli umie robić pompki 
3. **epizody -** 5 epizodów - wiek 18-45 lat - różne typu urody 

Jeden z dwóch głównych chłopaków będzie niesiony przez tłum wiec nie mogą bać się podniesienia. 

Możliwe wykorzystanie głosów aktorów. Na ten moment mogą się zgłaszać osoby z akcentami. 

**TIMING: **

03.05 - termin wysyłania zgłoszeń do 17.00 

07.05 - recall 

14.05 - przymiarki 

19.05 - zdjęcia warszawa i okolice 

**StAWKI : 1500 zł dniówka i między 2000 a 4000 zł prawa **

**Zgłoszenia można wysyłać do mnie do 03.05 do godziny 17.00 **

**Wybranym osobom wyślę info gdzie trzeba się zgłosić i co nagrać. **

**Maile proszę wysyłać na adres ****[slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com](mailto:slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com)**

W treści maila proszę wypisać 
1. Imię i nazwisko 
2. Wiek 
3. Do jakiej roli się zgłaszasz 
4. 2-3 aktualne zdjecia 
5. Numer telefonu 

W TYTULE MAILA PROSZE WPISAĆ IMEI I NAZWISKO + SKLEP

sharedPost.text:
Mamy w Polsce 21 wiek a dużo pracowników musi pracować po 12 godzin np na strefach wyzysku,albo w skandalicznych
 warunkach jak pracownicy Dino.

Dlatego musimy sobie wywalczyć te prawa.

Mój apel jest do świadomych i mądrych ludzi pracy. 

A nie do głupich i naiwnych głosujących na Tuska Mentzena i Brauna, kundelków wielkiego zagranicznego kapitału.

items.text:
Casting call and interest 
I know by looking at this picture, you all are like "What the hell" . Well I decided to write a comedy short so I can enter it into some festivals or maybe make it a web series. Looking to film this late September, but want to get the cast rolling . My two dicks ( Private Eyes )  are cast but looking for someone that can play a slapstick drunk, a couple that has great chemistry in arguing. 
And need about three or four extras as well. Will be a two or three night shoot. Food, reel and credit will be incorporated. This is a comedy , so let's have fun!
Email crawfordraun@gmail.com, attn : The two dicks picture
Send head shots and a small comedy reel or just a reel of yourself  to email above
Have all costumes for the roles and have the convenience store ready as well. This is going to be a blast !!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - CINEMATIC ARTS PROD 3 PHANTOM PAIN**

*Synopsis: After bodybuilder, Javier, breaks his arm and has to have it amputated, The Arm crawls off on a journey of its own, and after some searching, finds and attaches to Ronnie. Javier, still able to feel the arm moving, tries everything he can to either get The Arm back or move past it so he can compete to be the Juiciest Man Around. Eventually, after failing in every aspect and seeing The Arm thrive with Ronnie, Javier realizes he has to feel in order to heal. *

We are in dire need of extras this coming Friday morning to help us with our speed-dating scene. If you have availability and would be able to come help us out, it would be greatly appreciated. We are filming in the Denver area.

Attached is a google form to fill out if you're available so we will be able to send you more information and a call sheet on the day of.

We really hope to see you on set!!

[[https://forms.gle/Loi1uJ856GBhyDcZ6](https://forms.gle/Loi1uJ856GBhyDcZ6)](https://forms.gle/Loi1uJ856GBhyDcZ6)

items.text:
Producer: Casting Call – Lead Male Role for Indie Feature (June Shoot)

We are currently casting for an independent feature film shooting this June and are seeking a talented actor for a key role.
Role: Male Lead
Age Range: 30–40
Ethnicity/Look: Middle Eastern or similar appearance
Project Details:
This is an indie feature film with a character-driven story and strong dramatic elements. Filming is scheduled for June, with rehearsals beginning within the next few days.
Requirements:
• Strong acting experience (film or theatre)
• Availability for rehearsals on short notice
• Full availability during the June shooting schedule
• Ability to collaborate closely with director and cast
Location: london
To Apply:
Please submit your headshot, resume, and a show reel (if available) to au.filmstudios@gmail.com. Include “Female Lead Casting – Indie Feature” in the subject line.
We are looking for someone committed, versatile, and ready to bring depth to a compelling role. We look forward to seeing your submissions.
Best regards,
Edilberto Restino [Zero 1 Films & AU Films Production]
[au.filmstudios@gmail.com]

Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

items.text:
LOS ANGELES CASTING 🇳🇱

SKECHERS commercial for DUTCH TV featuring soccer legend Ruud Gullit.

Seeking fluent/native Dutch speakers in Los Angeles for one-line principal roles.

Must be LA local hire and able to self-report to set in Los Angeles.

Non-Union. FICORE welcome.
Rate: $1,500 + 20% AF
Shoot: May 11 in Los Angeles
Fitting: May 8 in Los Angeles
Callbacks: May 7 via Zoom
Self-tapes: April 30 – May 6

ROLES:
Athletic Gym-Goer — Woman, 18–30
Athletic Man — Man, 30–40
Car Valet — Man, 18–29
Soccer Fan — Man, 30–40
Restaurant Diner — Man, 40–50
Waiter — Woman, 18–30

All ethnic appearances welcome.

Must speak real fluent Dutch — not Duolingo Dutch.

Submit via Casting Networks:
https://app.castingnetworks.com/public-pages/open-call/skechers-slip-ins-dutch-tv/13ced886-4469-11f1-8db6-331d4b78bece

Please share with Dutch speakers, Dutch actors, Dutch expats, and Netherlands/Benelux community members in Los Angeles.

Hey all!

I'm hosting a two day physical comedy + mime workshop at the fabulous **Makers House Hastings** on the **16th & 17th May**. Currently there's a deal running over the bank holiday weekend so snap it up!

Would love to see some folk there 🎭 

The workshop is ideal for:

Standups

Clowns

Actors

Improvisors

Storytellers 

Those who want to connect with their bodies and enjoy the humour derived from it 

[https://www.makershousehastings.co.uk/allevents/p/mine-and-physical-comedy-with-david-hoskin-16th-17th-may](https://www.makershousehastings.co.uk/allevents/p/mine-and-physical-comedy-with-david-hoskin-16th-17th-may)

items.title: Hey all!

items.text:
Sharing a workshop for Theatre Makers - part of Practice Lab by PROJEKT EUROPA at Chisenhale Dance Space in London! Only a £5 contribution required! Bookings on the website: https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab

**13 May 2026 - 18:00-20:00**

**Who Am I When I’m Hacked? - A Creative Exploration of Social Media Identity led by Laura Mottola**

This creative workshop is a devising lab exploring the intersection of social media and identity. We will creatively explore a common and deeply personal experience: having your social media account hacked. The aim is to expose how intimately tied our digital presence is to our sense of self, and what happens when that identity is taken from us.

We will explore the emotional and psychological impact of losing control over our social media identity. Through guided discussion, improvisation, and collaborative devising, we’ll examine the blurred line between who we are and who we present ourselves to be online, and what’s at stake when that version is stolen. Being hacked is intimate. It's an invasion without fingerprints. It’s someone wearing your face and speaking in your voice. A contemporary tragedy with WiFi. We scroll. We curate. We perform. But who performs when we lose the account?

Join Laura to play at the edge of authorship and identity!

(Disclaimer**: **This workshop explores themes Laura is developing for a new performance work. The session is a research and devising lab, not a content extraction session. It is a collaborative exploration and any personal stories, text or movement generated remain the property of their creators).

Wed 23 Feb, 6.00-7.30pm GMT. Book now: [https://www.proudhaddockworkshops.com/book-a-workshop/p/online-auditioning-wed-23-feb-2022-6pm-730pm-2r7db-xe3ff-znejz-cc8gl](https://www.proudhaddockworkshops.com/book-a-workshop/p/online-auditioning-wed-23-feb-2022-6pm-730pm-2r7db-xe3ff-znejz-cc8gl)

Name That Tune, the world’s most iconic music game show, is officially making its return to the UK! with Alison Hammond at the helm.

**Name That Tune**, **are looking for people who have an ear for music to** go head-to-head in high-stakes rounds, for the chance to win thousands of pounds!

items.title: Hi there,

items.text:
Casting Call_ Lead Female Role for Indie Feature (June Shoot)

We are currently casting dor an independent feature films shooting this June and are seeking a talented actor for a key role.

Role: Female Lead

Age Range: 35 -30

Ethnicity/Look: Chinese, Thai or similar appearance

Project Details:

This is an indie feature film with a character-driven story  and strong dramatic elements. Filming is scheduled for June with rehearsals beginning within the next few days.

Requirements:

Strong acting experience (film or theatre)

Availability for rehearsals on short notice

Full availability during the June shooting schedule

Ability to collaborate closely with director and cast

Location: London

Compensation: £300 per day/deferred

To Apply:

Please send your headshot, resume and a showreel (if available) to [au.filmstudios@gmail.com](mailto:au.filmstudios@gmail.com). Include “Female lead casting – Indie Feature” in the subject line.

We are looking for someone committed, versatile, and ready to bring depth to a compelling role. We look forward to seeing your submissions. 

Best regards

Edilberto Restino [Zero 1 Films & AU film Productions]

📢 THE REVOLUTION HAS A NAME: SODIES KASI TV! 🎬🔥
Meadowlands, the wait is over. We aren't just a channel; we are the heartbeat of the 10 Zones. We are the lens of the youth, the voice of the hustle, and the home of the untold story.

⚠️ THE REALITY CHECK (Building from Zero)
We want to be 100% transparent with our community. We are a Grassroots Startup proving that you don't need a million-rand budget to have a billion-rand vision.

NO Professional Tools: We use our smartphones and our brains. 📱🧠

NO Big Budget: We are fueled by pure passion and Kasi discipline. 💸❌

NO Physical Building: The streets of Ndofaya are our studio. 🏘️🛣️
If we can start with nothing, you have no excuse to stay still!

📺 OUR PRODUCTION LINEUP (The Sodies Slate)
We are currently filming and scouting for the following shows:

MEADOWLANDS HEART & THE BLOOD COIN: Our flagship dramas. Raw, high-tension storytelling.

KASI SOUL SESSION: A safe space to vent, confess, or share your "Glow-Up" story. (Anonymity respected).

THE HUSTLE PROFILE: Highlighting the entrepreneurs of the 10 Zones.

JUNIOR QUIZ REVOLUTION: 15 Learners competing for the title of the smartest in the Kasi. 🧠🏆

KASI NEWS & YOUTH VOICE: The headlines that matter to us, by us.

THE STAGE: Showcasing DJs, Producers, Poets, and Dancers. 🎧✍️

🚀 HOW TO JOIN THE MOVEMENT
1. FOR ACTORS & CREW (The Founding 40):
We are looking for raw talent, not just resumes. If you have the heart to build this with us, apply below.
👉 APPLY HERE: [https://form.svhrt.com/69b5fc522ac0ef04c5970eab]

Hello currently casting for a SAG-AFTRA short film “Let Him Play”

In need of the following roles:

Ryan (18)

Neurodivergent, sensitive, observant, and full

of unexpected wonder. His quirks include

tapping, wiping his nose, headphones on, masking

an extraordinary ear for music that no one has ever nurtured.

Julie (50)

A loving mother suffocated by a

failing marriage. She believes in her

boys but is trapped in survival mode.

⚓ MALE DANCERS: ELEVATE YOUR CAREER AT SEA! ⚓
Are you a professionally trained Male Dancer with exceptional technique and a strong background in Classical Ballet and Contemporary? Ready to trade the studio for a stage that sails the world?

We are seeking polished and versatile male dancers to join our elite theatre ensembles on luxury cruise ships! This is your opportunity to perform in spectacular, high-energy productions while exploring global destinations.

The Spotlight Awaits:
Lead Performer in lavish theatre shows, dinner shows, special events, and high-impact pool shows.

Execute complex, fast-paced choreography with precision across multiple styles including Ballet, Modern, and Jazz.

Depending on suitability, integrate specialty artistic elements or routines (e.g., floor work or basic aerials) into the company's show formats.

Collaborate with the artistic team to create thrilling new performance pieces.

What We Are Looking For:
Exceptional Training: Completed certified performing arts training or similar professional qualification.

Classical Foundation: Strong professional training in Ballet, Modern, and Jazz dancing is essential.

Experience: Several years of professional stage production experience is highly desirable.

Versatility: Ability to learn choreography quickly and precisely; basic singing and acting training are a plus.

Language: Must be proficient in both spoken and written English.

Attitude: Highly motivated, a reliable team player, and focused on providing a world-class guest experience.

Don't let this opportunity sail by! Audition for a life-changing contract today.

🔗 View the full job description and APPLY NOW: https://www.5entertain.com/jobs/dancers-for-cruise-ships

#maledancer #dancerlife #CruiseShipPerformer #ballet #contemporarydance #jobsatsea #ApplyNow

items.text:
**Szukam modelki na zasadzie TFP Gliwice/Katowice ( Śląsk ) ‘’Sensualny gotyk’’**

 

Szukam pań które nie krępują się własnego ciała i chciałaby mieć ciekawą pamiątkę w postaci klimatycznych zdjęć. Wiem jak bardzo jest ważna akceptacja własnego ciała bo przez to też możemy inaczej funkcjonować. Przez takie zdjęcia można również tego dokonać. Sesja w głównej mierze jest jako taki motywator. Tematem sesji będzie sensualny gotyk.

 

Poszukuje kobiety w **wieku od 20 - 50 **lat nie koniecznie z doświadczeniem pozowania, na zasadach Tfp mieszkającej w Gliwicach lub okolicach Zabrze czy Katowice najdalej. Posiadam na wyposażeniu mini studio z kilkoma tłami oraz lampami. Mam również duży wybór kostiumów i gadżetów do wykorzystywania. Główny motyw to kobieta w selsualnym gotyku. Mile widziane panie, które posiadają jakieś ciekawe stroję gotyckie. ** Ja natomiast mam różne gadżety pod otoczenie typu: świeczniki, skrzynki czy nawet kałamarz a nawet nóż do listów w stylu średniowiecznym.**

** **

**Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia**

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.text:
**TELUS STORYHIVE SHORT FILM - CASTING CALL **

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM **

**"A PART OF ME"**

**Director:** Tristan Miura

**Producers:** Allison Ham, Caylee Watrin 

**Category:** Indie Short Film - Produced by Telus Storyhive

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**JENNIFER - *****Character portrayed is Female, White, 40-50 ***

Jennifer is a mother above all else, even if it means putting her own needs to the side. When it comes to Miles, she is constantly stuck between trying to do what is best and constantly second guessing if she is doing it right. Since Miles’ father’s passing, she’s done her best to be both a Mom and a Dad, but deep down she always feels like she will never be enough. She doesn’t know how to talk about Miles’ dad, which adds an invisible tension to their relationship. When Miles gets sick, she will do anything to make sure he gets better.** LEAD ($100/day)**

**NATASHA - *****Character portrayed is Female, Mixed Japanese, 20-30***

Natasha is an only child who was brought up to be well mannered but to always stand up for herself. Her mother passed away when she was young and so growing up she was extremely close with her father Takeo. She understands what it means to hurt, because of her mother’s passing, which allows her to empathize with everyone she meets. Her intelligence not only lives in her emotional maturity but also in her intellect. Despite this, she believes the world works in mysterious ways, even when it comes to her father’s passing. **SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

**JOYCIE - *****Character portrayed is Female, Japanese, 25-35***

Kiyoshi’s mom, Joycie, is a loving parent. She does her best to take care of children, despite them being interned. Her husband has been placed into forced labour of the Princeton highway and is rarely able to see them. She does her best to look out for not only her children, but all the other kids at Tashme. **1 line, 1 scene ($50/day)**

**UMP - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This umpire watches each pitch closely and calls the game with clear, authoritative “STRIKE” calls. Remains focused and impartial throughout the baseball. 2 lines, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**CATCHER - *****Character portrayed is Male, Open Ethnicity, 15-20***

This teenage catcher receives each pitch cleanly and taunts Miles quietly, trying to get in his head during the baseball game. Confident and slightly cocky, but stays locked into the play. 1 line, 1 scene. ***REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET. ($50/day)**

**EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE - *****Character portrayed is Open Gender, Open Ethnicity, 30-50***

This EMT/DOCTOR/NURSE rushes to get Miles into surgery at the hospital. **1 line (each), 1 scene ($50/day)**

**ADULT KIYOSHI (PHOTO DOUBLE) - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 30-50***

While Jennifer and Miles look through their family photo album, they find a photograph of Kiyoshi, standing proudly in front of their house. **($50/day)**

Hi everyone 👋

We’re Mangata Production, a new indie film production based in Vancouver, currently casting a **supporting female role** for a short film directed by **Regis Raffin**.

📍 **Shoot:** 1 day in June (exact date TBC)
📍 **Location:** North Vancouver (forest setting)
💰** $300 for the day**
🎬 **Non-union production**

We are looking for a **striking, model-type actress (between 20–40)** with natural confidence, and a good sense of humour! The role appears in a short, stylized and slightly surreal forest scene. Minimal dialogue.

📸 Please send:
* Headshot / standing shots
* Reel (if available) 
* Availability in June

Email us at : contact@mangata-music.com

Thanks!

* Availability in June

Email us at : contact@mangata-music.com

Thanks!

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: Barefoot in the Park

Barefoot in the Park by Neil Simon follows Paul and Corie Bratter, a pair of newlyweds moving into their first apartment in 1960s Greenwich Village. The honeymoon phase is quickly tested by a tiny, top-floor walk-up with no heat, a hole in the skylight, and a cast of eccentric neighbours. As Paul’s straight-laced legal mind clashes with Corie’s spontaneous, free-spirited nature, the couple must navigate their first major marital spat and decide if they can truly walk "barefoot in the park" together.

Creative Team:        Director: Julianne Christie          Producers: Janet Ellis, Michele Partridge

Production Details:
Audition Date: May 20, 2026
Audition & Performance Location: Peninsula Studio Theatre, 14600 North Bluff Rd, White Rock, BC
Rehearsals: Specific Dates TBD. June – September 2026
Performance Dates: September 17 – 27, 2026
Compensation: Actor Honorarium provided.
Perks: Free parking and food/refreshments provided at all rehearsals.

Character Breakdown:
Corie Bratter (Lead, Female, 20s to 30s): A free-spirited, optimistic newlywed who sees the world through rose-colored glasses. Must have high energy and excellent comedic timing.
Paul Bratter (Lead, Male, 20s–30s): HAS BEEN CAST
Ethel Banks (Supporting, Female, 40s–60s): Corie’s cautious and slightly weary mother. She finds herself on an unexpected adventure thanks to her daughter.
Victor Velasco (Supporting, Male, 40s–60s): The eccentric, colourful, and flirtatious neighbour from the attic. A larger-than-life character.
Telephone Repairman (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A grounded character who gets a front-row seat to the Bratters' domestic chaos.
Delivery Person (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A comedic role focused on the physical toll of climbing those six flights of stairs.

**Submission Instructions:
Please email your headshot and resume to: Janet Ellis, Executive Director, janet@peninsulaproductions.org
Selection Process: Sides and a specific audition time will be emailed to those selected to audition on May 20.
Deadline: Please submit your materials promptly for consideration.

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
W kolejnych majowych odcinkach serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) mam do rozdania następujące  role męskie:

1.Dziki (43) – dobrze zbudowany, może mieć tatuaże. Kieruje gangiem handlarzy narkotyków, który zajmuje się głównie rozprowadzaniem fentanylu. Gdy dochodzi do pobicia Grażyny i kradzieży narkotyków, postanawia sam namierzyć sprawców i odbić towar. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

2.Sebastian Wroński (53) – podstarzały podrywacz. Zamożny. Przemocowiec, który robi się agresywny po alkoholu. Często zdradzał żonę. Cały czas szukał młodszych kobiet, żeby je sponsorować w zamian za seks.

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 500 zł netto

3.Zdzisław Marecki (54) – średniego wzrostu, chudawy, trochę schorowany. Drobny złodziejaszek, mieszka w ośrodku dla osób, które niedawno opuściły zakład karny.

Data: 18. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

4.Ernest (29) – dobrze zbudowany. Chłopak Patrycji. Bardzo chciałby wejść do półświatka. Ma nadzieję, że napad na Grażynę mu w tym pomoże.

Daty: 18. i 19. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

5.Gruby (28) – silny, wysoki, masywny. Kolega Ernesta zwerbowany do pomocy w napadzie na Grażynę. NIEZBĘDNE PRAWO JAZDY

Daty: 18. i 19. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

6.Igor Krawczyk (43) – oficjalnie bezrobotny, ale pracuje na czarno w szemranej firmie pożyczkowej. Wpada w spiralę zbrodni, kończy na zabójstwie żony i jej kochanka. AKTOR

Daty: 20. i 23. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

7.Robert Zalewczuk, ps. Maniek (27) – drobny przestępca, typ dresika-oszusta. Przy kasie, ale ubiera się bez gustu. 

Daty: 19. i 20. maja
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

8.Roman Niciak (41) – ma biznes z nielegalnymi pożyczkami. Nalana twarz alkoholika, agresywny i wulgarny.

Daty: 19. i 20. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

9.Barman (31) – barman w spelunce. 

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
Wow✨So picturesque! 😍 I felt like I had entered an Eastern myth - a world where Buddhas and Bodhisattvas come to life. ✨
⚡️Don't miss the magical and captivating experience of a live performance. 
🎟️ Choose your best seats here: https://1kb.link/K0Piua
💫 Allow yourself to feel something unforgettable. 
💛 You deserve it all.
🥰Wishing you a day with joy and happiness ✨
#ShenYun2026 #ShenYun

items.text: Just two spaces left on next months INCREDIBLE script improv course, 4 TUESDAYS - next level acting!

textReferences.short_name: The Audition House, London casting & creative studios

sharedPost.text:
SCRIPT WORK -An Actors Gym.
Practice cold read and improvisation, bringing a short scene to life and learning tools to make self tapes get noticed! 
Practice is everything and playing is how we learn…. What’s not to love?
 
Dates/times are Tuesdays 11-2, Audition house,

5/12/19/26th May

£80 for four week course

Email me hello@meisnerlondon.com

#actortraining #selftapemay #actingcoach #meisnertechnique #meisnerinstitutelondon 

Yayssssss!

items.title: Just two spaces left on next months INCREDIBLE script improv course, 4 TUESDAYS - next level acting!

items.text: Just two spaces left!

sharedPost.text:
Next Level Acting...Next Level You

Three days. One technique. No limits.

The Meisner Technique is one of the most powerful acting methods in the world — and this June, we’re bringing it to Central London.
Meisner Foundation Course

📅 8, 9 & 10 June
🕐 11am – 3pm
📍 Central London

Three days. Twelve hours. A completely new relationship with your craft.
DM us or email hello@meisnerlondon.com to secure your place.
#MeisnerTechnique #ActingLondon #LondonActors #ActingWorkshop #Meisner ActingTraining TheatreLondon

items.text:
**CASTING CALL: COLORADO FEATURE FILM **

When two estranged brothers — one a straight gun enthusiast, one a trans experimental theater performer — separately flee to their childhood Colorado cabin, they find they can't escape the law, each other, or the question neither has been willing to ask: can you love someone you don't understand? 

Brothers is a socially charged film about freedom, stereotypes, and  brotherly love — with a little wit, gunfire, and whimsy.

Writer + Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Executive Producers: Jordan Kraft Lambert + Barnfly Productions

Producer and Casting Director: Jordan Kraft Lambert

Director of Photography: John Barnhardt

Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31

Locations: Red Feather Colorado, Fort Morgan Colorado

Check out our website for a sense of the vibe and message here: [https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite](https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite)

**ROLES:**

**Liam ***Lead*

30-39 / Trans Man

Liam is a mid 30s trans man who fled to Colorado after anti-trans legislation passed in Kansas. Assuming the family skiing cabin would be empty in the height of summer after his father’s death, he posts up there to reconnect with himself, train to hike the continental divide, and finish preparing a moth costume for his theatrical debut in Montana. He has deep commitment issues, a degree in theater, and an irrational connection to a potted plant. He didn’t plan on his brother showing up to the cabin with the law on his tail. 

Performers who bring their own experience of gender, family estrangement, and chosen community will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled restraint to tender warmth. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

**Jake ***Lead*

30-39 / Cis Man

Jake is a mid 30s cis man on the run from government goons. In an attempt to get out of town and clear his head, he flees to his childhood cabin in the Colorado mountains, not suspecting the sibling who abandoned him to cold and distant parents when he was teenager would already be there. A construction worker by trade whose brawling has gotten him into trouble more than once, he’s built a moat of masculine conformity around himself and only feels safe with a gun (or six) nearby. 

Performers who bring their own experience of family estrangement, blue collar culture, and LGBTQ allyship will be prioritized. Emotional range includes controlled aggression to honest tenderness. Comfort with driving on set and prop firearms are required.
* Rate: ~$4,000 Project Flat
* Duration: Rehearsals in June after 5pm, ~14 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/18 - 7/31, Red Feather Colorado, food and housing included
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**Melody ***Supporting*

25-60 / Any gender with drag queen energy 

Melody is Liam’s best friend, and she is magnificent. Glamorous, funny, and deeply principled, she leads the queer cavalry into the warehouse with queenly authority and zero hesitation. She is warm to Liam in the way of found family — no conditions, no questions, just presence. She and Declan recognize each other instantly in the parking lot: two people who showed up for exactly the same reason. They walk in together, side by side, in slow motion. She is a showstopper in every scene she’s in.

Strong comedic presence and warm queenly energy. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 

* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

 **Declan ***Supporting*

30-60 / Cis Man

Declan is Jake’s blue-collar buddy who shows up, no questions asked, with a convoy of trucks behind him. He is steady, laconic, and genuinely good. When he meets Melody in the parking lot, he assesses the situation in about four seconds and makes a plan to join forces with the queer cavalry. His walk into the warehouse alongside Melody is one of the film’s key images.

Physical ease and natural authority. Comfort with ensemble action sequences and prop firearms. 
* Rate: ~$300 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Queer Cavalry ***Supporting*

25-60 / LGBTQIA+ Community Members

Eleven queers dressed for maximum ego expression pile out of five Subarus join forces with a crew of blue collar men to rescue someone they've never met — because Liam asked, and that's enough. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to stay out of it, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who bring their full selves to this. Drag queens, trans and nonbinary performers, queer folks of every flavor — if this community is yours, we want you in this scene. Strong energy and warmth, physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the blue-collar crew arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**Blue Collar Crew ***Supporting*

25 - 60 / Straight Men

Eleven blue-collar workers pile out of their trucks and join forces with a cavalry of queers to walk to rescue someone they'd do anything for — because Jake is one of their own, and that's all they need to know. This is the image the film has been building toward: a group of people who have every cultural reason to keep their heads down, choosing not to.

We are looking for performers who feel lived-in and real. Construction workers, tradespeople, outdoorsmen — if this world is yours, or close to it, we want you in this scene. Physical confidence, comfort in a crowd, and a willingness to handle non-functional prop firearms are the primary requirements. An acceptance of the queer cavalry arriving in the same parking lot is necessary. If you believe no one is free until we’re all free, this role is for you. 
* Rate: ~$200 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 1 Day on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

**The Goons ***Supporting*

30 - 50 / Men

Four men, broadly menacing, are the government henchmen sent to kidnap Jake. They are hired for violence, but are more invested in their spades game than in their hostage. They bicker about reneging, argue about counting, and nearly miss Jake’s escape because one slammed a jack at the wrong moment.

Character work and comedic timing are essential. The Head Goon in particular sets the tone: quietly authoritative at the card table, supremely unbothered by everything else happening around him.

Strong ensemble instincts. Ability to make a card game feel tense and funny at the same time. Comfort with prop firearms.
* Rate: ~$400 Project Flat
* Duration: 2 remote rehearsals in June after 5pm, 2 Days on Set 
* Shooting Dates: 7/25 - 7/26
* On-screen driving: Valid drivers license required
* On-screen gun use: all firearms will be set-safe props 

Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

—------------------

Thank you for your interest in our project! Apply at this link: [[https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6)](https://forms.gle/XSYTBgjRh5WX9Jdb6?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExcEprSDdpTGZWbHNPaFZjTnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5bwkIDBI4h67uz3Ug7J_FnFwfx6Qx5Tnff0_dUx-AUskG4--0oHktKo_lKRA_aem_fD4W7t_GhiiOSjs82_C9VA)

Check out our website for more information here: [https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite](https://onedaychiorcolorado.my.canva.site/brothersmoviewebsite)

A socially charged film about freedom, stereotypes, and brotherly love with a little wit, gunfire, and whimsy.'
