items.title: **CASTING CALL: COLORADO FEATURE FILM **

items.text:
CASTING CALL – JORDAN (UNDERSTUDY / LEAD BACKUP)
Between Two Lives
A Solkem Studios Film
Hello, all

        I am currently seeking an understudy for the lead role of Jordan in my upcoming short film “Between Two Lives,” a faith-based, character-driven story about identity, growth, and the struggle between two different paths in life.
This role is central to the story and requires an actor who can portray emotional depth, internal conflict, and personal growth.

   ROLE: JORDAN (UNDERSTUDY / LEAD BACKUP)

Male, mid–late 20s

Strong ability to portray emotional and internal conflict

Natural, grounded delivery (not overly theatrical)

Comfortable with faith-based themes

Casting Note:
Preferably seeking an African/Black actor for this role, but open to all qualified actors.
Note:
This role includes a few kissing scenes (non-explicit).
There is NO nudity or explicit content, but actors should be comfortable with on-screen intimacy.

       CHARACTER DESCRIPTION:
Jordan is caught between two lives—one rooted in familiar habits, past relationships, and comfort, and another leading toward growth, peace, and purpose.
His journey is emotional, reflective, and spiritual, requiring a subtle but powerful performance.

KEY PERFORMANCE ELEMENTS:

Internal struggle and quiet emotional moments

Honest, grounded dialogue

Transformation over time

Vulnerability in key scenes

Filming Location: Aurora & Denver, Colorado
Shoot Dates: July 10–12, 2026. ( MUST BE AVAILABLE THESE DATES TO SUBMIT  THANK YOU )

Production: Independent / Faith-Based Film

Compensation: Unpaid project,but will provide food, Drinks and snacks.  

On-screen credit

IMDb credit

Copy of the final film

TO SUBMIT:
Headshot
Reel or past work (if available)
Contact information
Email: reinesolkem101@gmail.com
Phone: 720-572-0029

    I'm Looking for actors who are serious, reliable, and excited to help bring a strong, meaningful story to life.

CASTING CALL – JORDAN (UNDERSTUDY / LEAD BACKUP)
Between Two Lives
A Solkem Studios Film
Hello, all

        I am currently seeking an understudy for the lead role of Jordan in my upcoming short film “Between Two Lives,” a faith-based, character-driven story about identity, growth, and the struggle between two different paths in life.
This role is central to the story and requires an actor who can portray emotional depth, internal conflict, and personal growth.

   ROLE: JORDAN (UNDERSTUDY / LEAD BACKUP)

Male, mid–late 20s

Strong ability to portray emotional and internal conflict

Natural, grounded delivery (not overly theatrical)

Comfortable with faith-based themes

Casting Note:
Preferably seeking an African/Black actor for this role, but open to all qualified actors.
Note:
This role includes a few kissing scenes (non-explicit).
There is NO nudity or explicit content, but actors should be comfortable with on-screen intimacy.

       CHARACTER DESCRIPTION:
Jordan is caught between two lives—one rooted in familiar habits, past relationships, and comfort, and another leading toward growth, peace, and purpose.
His journey is emotional, reflective, and spiritual, requiring a subtle but powerful performance.

KEY PERFORMANCE ELEMENTS:

Internal struggle and quiet emotional moments

Honest, grounded dialogue

Transformation over time

Vulnerability in key scenes

Filming Location: Aurora & Denver, Colorado
Shoot Dates: July 10–12, 2026. ( MUST BE AVAILABLE THESE DATES TO SUBMIT  THANK YOU )

Production: Independent / Faith-Based Film

Compensation: Unpaid project,but will provide food, Drinks and snacks.  

On-screen credit

IMDb credit

Copy of the final film

TO SUBMIT:
Headshot
Reel or past work (if available)
Contact information
Email: reinesolkem101@gmail.com
Phone: 720-572-0029

    I'm Looking for actors who are serious, reliable, and excited to help bring a strong, meaningful story to life.
items.title: CASTING CALL – JORDAN (UNDERSTUDY / LEAD BACKUP)

Hi everyone! I’m a colombian actress in Denver looking to build a creative crew for consistent, high-quality content in English and Spanish.

I’ve written and produced several shorts on my own that have gained some **interest on social media**, but I want to team up with others to level up our production value.

This is a **collaborative passion project, **the goal is to create professional scenes/shorts in **one-day shoots** to grow our reels, gain recognition, and eventually pitch larger funded projects together. **Students are more than welcome!**

**Interested? Please drop a comment with:**
1. What role you’d play (Writer, DP, Editor, Actor, etc.)
2. A quick note on your experience or a link to your work.

**I'd love to create something together!** ✨

Producer: Casting Call – Lead Male Role for Indie Feature (June Shoot)

We are currently casting for an independent feature film shooting this June and are seeking a talented actor for a key role.
Role: Male Lead
Age Range: 30–40
Ethnicity/Look: Middle Eastern or similar appearance
Project Details:
This is an indie feature film with a character-driven story and strong dramatic elements. Filming is scheduled for June, with rehearsals beginning within the next few days.
Requirements:
• Strong acting experience (film or theatre)
• Availability for rehearsals on short notice
• Full availability during the June shooting schedule
• Ability to collaborate closely with director and cast
Location: london
To Apply:
Please submit your headshot, resume, and a show reel (if available) to au.filmstudios@gmail.com. Include “Female Lead Casting – Indie Feature” in the subject line.
We are looking for someone committed, versatile, and ready to bring depth to a compelling role. We look forward to seeing your submissions.
Best regards,
Edilberto Restino [Zero 1 Films & AU Films Production]
[au.filmstudios@gmail.com]

items.text:
Christmas at Bewl Water – Performer Auditions 2026
Christmas at Bewl Water is seeking talented, engaging and energetic performers to help bring our immersive festive experience to life this winter. Set within woodland beside the South East’s largest reservoir, this is a three-hour immersive adventure designed for families. Through live performance, storytelling, interactive workshops and one-to-one character encounters, audiences take part in a festive journey filled with magic, music and seasonal storytelling. Following three successful years, the event has become one of Kent’s most popular family Christmas experiences. We return this November and December with an expanded cast and exciting new creative elements.

 

Roles

We are casting a large ensemble of performers to portray a variety of festive characters within the experience. These include:

Scripted character roles

Roaming interactive characters

Movement and dance-based performers

Featured character roles within the narrative

All roles involve portraying fictional festive characters as part of an immersive storyline.

 

Who We’re Looking For

Actors

We are seeking strong performers with excellent characterisation skills, physical awareness, stamina, and a natural ability to engage with family audiences.

 

Dancers

We are also looking for performers with strong movement or dance training. These roles involve learning and performing choreographed routines as part of the wider experience, while remaining in character and interacting with audiences.

 

All Performers Should Be Comfortable With

Repeating performances multiple times per day

Interactive and improvised audience engagement

Maintaining character and energy throughout the day

Working collaboratively as part of an ensemble

 

Inclusivity

Christmas at Bewl Water is committed to inclusive casting and welcomes performers of all backgrounds, identities and abilities. All roles are open to any performer able to convincingly portray the character within the context of the production.

 

Audition Details

Format

Group movement and warm-ups

Improvisation and interactive exercises

Character-based work and short scenes

Movement/dance call (where relevant)

 

Location

Salomons Estate, Broomhill Road, Tunbridge Wells, Kent, TN4 8JU

 

Dates

Monday 15th June 2026

Monday 22nd June 2026

 

You will only need to attend one date. Further details will be shared upon invitation. Shortlisted performers may be invited to a recall or workshop.

 

 

Rehearsals

Early November 2026 (weekdays)

 

Performance Dates

Saturday 28th November

Sunday 29th November

Saturday 5th December

Sunday 6th December

Saturday 12th December

Sunday 13th December

Saturday 19th December

Sunday 20th December

Monday 21st December

Tuesday 22nd December

Wednesday 23rd December

Thursday 24th December

 

Performers must be available for all dates listed above.

 

Location

Bewl Water, Bewlbridge Lane, Lamberhurst, Kent, TN3 8JH

 

Please note: Due to the rural location, independent travel is strongly recommended.

 

Contract

Paid freelance contract

Approx. 10 hours per day (varies by role)

Full details provided to shortlisted applicants.

 

Requirements

Aged 18+

Right to work in the UK

DBS check (or willingness to obtain one)

Comfortable working outdoors in winter conditions

Available for all rehearsals and performance dates

Performance experience preferred

 

How to Apply

All applications and enquiries should be sent to: chloe.gifford@bewlwater.co.uk

 

Please include the following with your application:

Your CV

A recent headshot

Showreel or improvised audition video 

Detail any relevant performance, dance or family entertainment experience

 

For further information about the event, please visit:

** Limited Actor + Model Headshot Sessions (Downtown LA – First Come First Serve)**

We’re opening up a very limited set of professional headshot sessions designed specifically for actors, models, and creatives looking to update their portfolio, casting profiles, and branding images.

This is part of our community's mission to **make professional creative resources more accessible to underserved and emerging talent**, while still maintaining industry-level quality.

First come, first serve — we will reach out directly to confirmed applicants
Date: Tentatively Friday (final confirmation pending)

** SESSION OPTIONS**

** $50 — Quick Refresh**
• 15 minutes
• 1 look
• 1–2 edited images
•* 2 slots available *

**$100 — Standard Headshot (Most Recommended)**
• 30 minutes
• 1 look
• 2–4 edited images

*4 slots available *

 **$200 — Professional Session**
• 60 minutes
• 1 look
• 5–7 edited images

*3 slots available *

 **$300 — Premium Session**
• 60 minutes
• 2 looks
• Full guided shoot experience
• 6–10 edited images

*1 slots available *

**Only 10 slots available this round!**

**HOW TO BOOK**

**Comment below with:**
1. **Your name**
2. **The tier you’re interested in ($50 / $100 / $200 / $300)**
3. **Your availability for Friday**

**We will review responses and reach out directly to confirm time slots.**

items.text:
Weekly Wins!

Come on then, what’s been your little victory this week? 🎬

Maybe you landed an audition, nailed a self-tape, finally updated your headshots, or just made it through Monday without swearing at the universe.

Big or small, every win counts, drop yours in the comments and let’s give each other a bit of well earned applause. 👏🎬🇬🇧

topComments.text: I accidentally got myself an audition for a big feature film. I did OK too so fingers crossed 🤞

My son was in a short film, filmed in the beautiful countryside.  He has a disability & holds the bannister on stairs. He walked up a 400meter hill, steep path without a rail for filming, had to go down part way & up again a few times for different scenes. He had an amazing experience. I ask him to do the dishwasher, he’s says he’s tired. He worked long days often not getting back to the accommodation until 10 & didn’t complain about being tired once!

sharedPost.text:
ʙʀɪᴇꜰ #094 — ʟᴀʀɢᴇ ꜱᴄᴀʟᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ᴄᴀʟʟ 

ᴡᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴄᴜʀʀᴇɴᴛʟʏ ᴄᴀꜱᴛɪɴɢ ꜰᴏʀ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴏᴏᴛᴇᴅ ʟᴏᴏᴋʙᴏᴏᴋ — ᴀ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪ-ꜱᴄᴇɴᴇ ᴘʀᴏᴅᴜᴄᴛɪᴏɴ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀɪɴɢ 40+ ɪɴᴅɪᴠɪᴅᴜᴀʟꜱ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴠᴀʀɪᴏᴜꜱ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʟɪᴇɴᴛ ɪꜱ ꜱᴇᴇᴋɪɴɢ ᴀ ᴅɪᴠᴇʀꜱᴇ ᴄᴀꜱᴛ ᴀᴄʀᴏꜱꜱ ᴀɢᴇꜱ, ᴄᴏᴍᴘʟᴇxɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴀɴᴅ ʙᴀᴄᴋɢʀᴏᴜɴᴅꜱ, ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴀ ꜱᴛʀᴏɴɢ ᴇᴍᴘʜᴀꜱɪꜱ ᴏɴ ᴄᴜʟᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴀᴜᴛʜᴇɴᴛɪᴄɪᴛʏ, ᴘʀᴇꜱᴇɴᴄᴇ, ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴀᴛᴜʀᴀʟ ᴏɴ-ꜱᴇᴛ ᴘᴇʀꜰᴏʀᴍᴀɴᴄᴇ.

ᴀᴛᴛᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ ɪꜱ ᴀ ꜰᴜʟʟ ᴏᴠᴇʀᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴏꜰ ᴀʟʟ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴅ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ.

ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟᴇᴅ ʙʀᴇᴀᴋᴅᴏᴡɴꜱ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ʙᴇᴇɴ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ɪɴᴛᴏ 5 ꜱᴇᴘᴀʀᴀᴛᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰꜱ, ᴇᴀᴄʜ ᴏᴜᴛʟɪɴɪɴɢ ꜱᴘᴇᴄɪꜰɪᴄ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴘᴇʀ ʀᴏʟᴇ. ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀᴠᴀɪʟᴀʙʟᴇ ᴏɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ.

ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ, ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ:
• ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀɴɴᴇʟ  
• ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʀᴇʟᴇᴠᴀɴᴛ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴄᴀʀᴇꜰᴜʟʟʏ  
• ꜱᴜʙᴍɪᴛ ᴏɴʟʏ ꜰᴏʀ ʀᴏʟᴇꜱ ʏᴏᴜ ᴀᴄᴄᴜʀᴀᴛᴇʟʏ ꜰɪᴛ  

📲 ꜰᴏʀ ᴀʟʟ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ᴅᴇᴛᴀɪʟꜱ:  
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb36BNyJ93wXH19fMW2U

📩 ꜰᴏʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ, ᴡʜᴀᴛꜱᴀᴘᴘ ᴀᴅᴀ ᴏɴ:  +27 76 180 2729  

⚠️ ᴘʟᴇᴀꜱᴇ ᴀᴠᴏɪᴅ ꜱᴇɴᴅɪɴɢ “ʜɪ/ʜᴇʏ” ᴍᴇꜱꜱᴀɢᴇꜱ — ᴏɴʟʏ ꜱᴛʀᴜᴄᴛᴜʀᴇᴅ ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴏʀ ᴄʟᴇᴀʀ Qᴜᴇꜱᴛɪᴏɴꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ʙᴇ ʀᴇꜱᴘᴏɴᴅᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ.

ꜱᴜʙᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴꜱ ᴛʜᴀᴛ ᴅᴏ ɴᴏᴛ ꜰᴏʟʟᴏᴡ ᴛʜᴇ ʙʀɪᴇꜰ ʀᴇQᴜɪʀᴇᴍᴇɴᴛꜱ ᴡɪʟʟ ɴᴏᴛ ʙᴇ ᴄᴏɴꜱɪᴅᴇʀᴇᴅ.

items.previewTitle: Open Casting Call: Runners & Extras for Major Sports Brand — Weeble Mountain Casting
items.previewDescription: Weeble Mountain is casting a photo + video shoot for a major running brand! We are looking for runners + extras. The shoot will take place in New York, NY. Casting is open to anyone who lives in the NYC area.. No modeling or acting experience required to apply. We specialize in real people casting.

sharedPost.text:
CASTING CALL | RUNNERS | S27

We’re casting runners for a photo + video shoot for a major running brand. We need intermediate, advanced, and elite runners age 18+ across all identities. Experience with road running and good running form required. 

Pay is $2,000 for 1 day of work in New York, NY between Thu 5/28 - Wed 6/3 (1 day, TBD) with a fitting on Wed 5/27 or Tue 6/2. Must be 18+ and live in NY. Must disclose your talent agency if applicable. The advertiser’s name will be disclosed prior to booking if you are offered a role. 

We are also casting extras for this project! We need people ages 18-70 across all identities, pay is $500/day. See link for more info! 

TO APPLY:  https://www.weeblemountain.com/opencastingcalls/s27-runners

DON’T FIT THIS ROLE? Sign up for general consideration at https://weeblemountain.com/signup | We specialize in real people casting.

items.text:
Pilnie potrzebuje kobiety wyglądającej na ok. 35-40 lat do roli matki głównej bohaterki w moim krótkometrażowym filmie non profit. Nagrywany on będzie w Warszawie, 30 i 31 maja tego roku, prosiłabym o dostępność w oba dni. Jest to jedna z ważniejszych ról, zawierająca dwie sceny wymagające pokazania emocji bohatera, dlatego świetnie jakby zgłosił się ktoś z jakimś doświadczeniem aktorskim, ale rozważę każde zgłoszenia, również ludzi który chcą zacząć budować swoje portfolio:). Film ma dotyczyć przewlekłego bólu wśród młodzieży, chce go zrealizować jako projekt zwracający uwagę na ten problem społeczny, chce go również wysłać na festiwale.
Bardzo proszę o przemyślane zgłoszenia z przemyśleniem dostępności 30 i 31 maja, ponieważ data jest już zaklepana i bardzo zależy mi by nikt się już nie wycofał.
Bardzo proszę o kontakt w komentarzach lub w wiadomości prywatnej!

topComments.text: Hej, rozumiem temat, wiem o czym to jest , zapraszam Cię do kontaktu, jeśli jesteś zainteresowana to pisze z mojego profilu :)

items.text:
W kolejnych majowych odcinkach serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) mam do rozdania następujące role żeńskie:

1.Magda (16) – córka Krawczyka, typowa nastolatka.

Data: 20. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

2.Ciocia (35)  – siostra denatki Krawczykowej. Zszokowana śmiercią siostry, ale trzyma się ze względu na siostrzenicę. Uczynna kobieta. 

Data: 20. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3.Grażyna Kalinowska (46) – dość atrakcyjna, energiczna. Matka Kaśki. Po stracie pracy popadła w długi. Aby z nich wyjść, zaczęła rozprowadzać narkotyki dla lokalnej grupy przestępczej.

Data: 18. maja
Stawka: 500 zł netto

4.Kaśka (26) – córka Grażyny. Chętnie korzysta z pieniędzy zarabianych przez matkę na handlu narkotykami. Nieopatrznie zwierza się Patrycji z tego, czym zajmuje się jej matka.

Data: 18. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

5.Patrycja Kupis (25) – atrakcyjna, najlepsza przyjaciółka Kaśki. Razem z chłopakiem Ernestem postanawiają okraść Grażynę z narkotyków. 

Data: 18. i 19. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
W kolejnych majowych odcinkach serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) mam do rozdania następujące  role męskie:

1.Dziki (43) – dobrze zbudowany, może mieć tatuaże. Kieruje gangiem handlarzy narkotyków, który zajmuje się głównie rozprowadzaniem fentanylu. Gdy dochodzi do pobicia Grażyny i kradzieży narkotyków, postanawia sam namierzyć sprawców i odbić towar. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

2.Sebastian Wroński (53) – podstarzały podrywacz. Zamożny. Przemocowiec, który robi się agresywny po alkoholu. Często zdradzał żonę. Cały czas szukał młodszych kobiet, żeby je sponsorować w zamian za seks.

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 500 zł netto

3.Zdzisław Marecki (54) – średniego wzrostu, chudawy, trochę schorowany. Drobny złodziejaszek, mieszka w ośrodku dla osób, które niedawno opuściły zakład karny.

Data: 18. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

4.Ernest (29) – dobrze zbudowany. Chłopak Patrycji. Bardzo chciałby wejść do półświatka. Ma nadzieję, że napad na Grażynę mu w tym pomoże.

Daty: 18. i 19. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

5.Gruby (28) – silny, wysoki, masywny. Kolega Ernesta zwerbowany do pomocy w napadzie na Grażynę. NIEZBĘDNE PRAWO JAZDY

Daty: 18. i 19. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

6.Igor Krawczyk (43) – oficjalnie bezrobotny, ale pracuje na czarno w szemranej firmie pożyczkowej. Wpada w spiralę zbrodni, kończy na zabójstwie żony i jej kochanka. AKTOR

Daty: 20. i 23. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

7.Robert Zalewczuk, ps. Maniek (27) – drobny przestępca, typ dresika-oszusta. Przy kasie, ale ubiera się bez gustu. 

Daty: 19. i 20. maja
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

8.Roman Niciak (41) – ma biznes z nielegalnymi pożyczkami. Nalana twarz alkoholika, agresywny i wulgarny.

Daty: 19. i 20. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

9.Barman (31) – barman w spelunce. 

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga

items.text:
PRZESMYK sezon 2 ostatni rozdział.                                                      

Od kilku miesięcy widzicie  FB Studio ABM relacje i ogłoszenia z realizacji tajemniczego serialu. Pewnie już wszyscy wiedzą , ale my dopiero dzisiaj możemy to ogłosić. Tak, to jest drugi sezon serialu PRZESMYK.  

W PIERWSZYM KOMENTARZU ZAMIESZCZAMY link do formularza zgłoszeniowego. 

Zapraszamy do wypełniania go mieszkańców WARSZAWY i najbliższych okolic.  

Poszukujemy: 
komandosów - osób dobrze zbudowanych, wysokich, kulturystów, bokserów, zapaśników, judoków, doświadczonych zawodników jak i emerytowanych sportowcó. Zapraszamy panó i panie  w wieku 30-50 lat i  epizodystów - również w wieku 30-50 

Wszystkie szczegóły i stawki w formularzu zgoszeniowym. Link do niego w PIERWSZYM KOMENTARZU.

TO JUŻ OSTATNIA SZANSA NA UDZIAŁ W DRUGIM SEZONIE  PRZESMYKU!!!

Studio ABM  najkrótsza droga na plan filmowy!

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CASTING – EPIZODYŚCI 🎬  zdjęcia w Warszawie (brak zwrotów za dojazd) 5 i 6 maja (do potwierdzenia data i informacja czy dana rola będzie miała 1 dzień czy 2 dni zdjęciowe - prosimy o zgłoszenia osoby w pełni dyspozycyjne  5 i 6 maja)

Do pilotażowego odcinka serialu fabularyzowanego (true crime / paradokument) poszukujemy epizodystów do poniższych ról:  

🔹 1. Podejrzany (epizod mówiony)  
Mężczyzna 29–35 lat, wschodni akcent/język (rosyjski/ukraiński mile widziany), dobrze zbudowany, „gangsterski” vibe.  
💰 700 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 2. Kurier (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 35–45 lat, zmęczony, niepewny, człowiek żyjący na marginesie 
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 3. Mechanik (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 39–50 lat, zwyczajny, konkretny, mile widziana ciemniejsza karnacja lub opalenizna.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 4. Rekruter (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 35–45 lat, sprytny, kontaktowy, typ sprzedawcy.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 5. Ekspert (epizod mówiony)  
Osoba 40–65 lat, spokojny, precyzyjny głos, możliwa gra bez pokazywania twarzy.  
💰 560 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 6. Jarosław (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 30–35 lat, z zarostem.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 7. Kobieta (epizod niemy)  
25–35 lat, ładna brunetka, naturalny wygląd.  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 8. Dziewczynka (epizod niemy)  - tylko dzieci ze zgodą PIP w naszej agencji!
ok. 7 lat  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 9. Mężczyzna (epizod mówiony)  
ok. 60 lat, wschodni wygląd/język  
💰 490 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 10. Kobieta (epizod niemy)  
50–65 lat, korpulentna  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 11. Kurier (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna ok. 50 lat, wysoki, krępy  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 12. Bezdomny (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 40–65 lat, z bujną brodą  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 13. Nadawca (epizod niemy)  
Mężczyzna 30–55 lat, raczej postawny, może być typ ochroniarza  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

🔹 14. Policjant (epizod niemy)  
Funkcjonariusz / typ mundurowy  
💰 350 zł brutto/dzień  

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com  

➡️ W tytule: PILOT  

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o:  
1. Imię i nazwisko  
2. Miejsce zamieszkania  
3. Wiek  
4. Wzrost  
5. Rozmiar ubrania  
6. 2 zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka, aktualne!)  
7. Link do wizytówki / nagrania (YouTube)  
8. Podaj numer roli do której się zgłaszasz
⏰ Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do 01.05 do godz. 20:00  

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥

items.text:
[COLL FOR MODELS] Berlin 🇩🇪 | May 30 – June 5

I’ll be in Berlin from May 30 to June 5 and I’m looking for high-quality female collaborators.
The Vision: My expertise lies in expressive portraiture and artistic nude photography, often blending the human figure with natural scenery.
While my portfolio features bold artistic nude work, I am equally open to shooting high-end portraits, fashion, or lifestyle with models who bring strong expression and creativity to the table. It’s all about the mood and the art!

Message me directly with your portfolio/IG.

IG: @hughleo1994

items.text:
CASTING CALL – VIDEO / FASHION COLLABORATION – BERLIN
Hi! My name is Hanna and I’m a producer based in Berlin, currently working on a fashion video editorial in collaboration with Naomi Tarazi. 

We are shooting with a professional production team in a Berlin hotel location.

Looking for:
– Female model
– East / Southeast Asian appearance
– Slim build, strong natural presence
– Comfortable in front of camera (video & stills)

Concept:
A clean, intimate hotel setting with a slightly awkward, off-balance mood. Focus on body lines, movement, and subtle, unconventional posing.

Mood:
– minimal
– quiet
– slightly strange / cinematic
– feminine but not overly polished

Styling:
Naomi Tarazi garments (sculptural silhouettes, tights, textures) + mix of minimalistic clothes and designer pieces 

HMU:
Natural skin, simple hair (straight / tied)

Shooting:
– within the next month
– Berlin (hotel location)
– professional crew on set (production studio)

You will receive:
THIS IS AN UNPAID POSITION
– professional video material + edited images for your portfolio

Moodboard attached

If you feel aligned with this aesthetic, please DM me or comment with your portfolio / Instagram and I’ll end you more details✨

Or reach me by this Email Address: hanna@nusual.studio
Selected models may be considered for future collaborations

items.text:
PRIVATE TUTORIAL / One on one Coaching? 
DANCESPORT and Ballroom Dancing and other Dances. 💃💃💃

BOOK NOW!!! 

‎Professional Choreographer | Dance Instructor | Creative Director
‎Bringing Every Beat to Life with Passion & Precision
‎
‎Offering a Full Range of Dance Services:
‎• Fitness Dances (Aero, Cardio, Zumba)
‎• Ballroom & Dancesport Coaching (One-on-One)
‎• Line Dancing (Lead Dance)
‎• Cotillion De Honor & Wedding Dances
‎• Dance Production Numbers
‎• Street Dance & Festival Performances
‎• Bench/Bleacher/Yell & Cheerdance Routines
‎• Corporate Presentations
‎• Folk & Foreign Cultural Dances
‎• Afro Latin Dances (Zouk, Kizomba, Bachata, Salsa)
‎
‎
‎Bonus Packages Available:
‎• Costume & Makeup Assistance
‎• On-the-Day Support & Coordination
‎• Provincial Services Accepted
‎
‎Watch Me In Action:
‎• Todo Dance Fitness Compilation
‎• Zindakan Crew Compilation
‎• Facebook Sample
‎
‎Book Now:
‎Call/Text/Viber: 0991-9695388 or 0927-9161521
‎Viber Preferred: 0991-9695388
‎Or send a private message via Messenger!
‎
‎#SayawIsLife #DanceWithPurpose #PhilippineChoreographer #choreographerph #danceinstructor
‎#zumbainstructor #koryograper #pilipinaskoryograper #mananayaw #streetdancing #philippinefestivaldancer #philippinefestivalchoreographer

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören

Seit Jahren ist er einer der bekanntesten Dokumentar-Filmer des Landes, mit einer unüberschaubaren Liste von – auch jeder Menge – internationalen Produktionen, sodaß man ihn eigentlich gar nicht mehr vorstellen muß: Georg Riha.

Im Gespräch mit Sarah Fuchs erzählt er aus erster Hand wie sich wie seine Produktionen Form annehmen und wie sich die Arbeit und Möglichkeiten über die Jahre  geändert haben, auch am Beispiel des aktuellsten Dok-Films, der gerade in den Kinos startet:  Über Österreich

items.title: Special Guest: Georg Riha

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors ready to build a working career (not just train)?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Jersey Boys (directed by Clint Eastwood) and played Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time.

I’ve been amazed and grateful by the wave of interest and messages recently. It’s been amazing connecting with so many of you.

I’m now offering something I wish existed when I was starting out:

A 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

One of the biggest frustrations I hear is this:
Actors are told “get an agent” but then once they have one, nothing happens.
And for many actors, the challenge is figuring out how to get an agent in the first place.

This session is designed for both.

We sit down and go through:
• What actually makes an actor book work (beyond just talent)
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• The materials you really need and what most actors get wrong
• How to approach auditions and self-tapes strategically
• Building a career that moves forward, not just sideways

You’ll leave with a clear, personalised plan so you’re not stuck wondering when the next audition is coming or why you’re not booking. You’ll know exactly what steps to take to create the career you want. 

If you’ve been feeling stuck or unsure, feel free to message me for details or to book.

items.text:
Please join me on Wednesday, May 20, 2026 from 3:30 to 6:00 for Women in Film & Video New England
monthly meeting where I will be holding an Open Call for Actors!

I am currently casting Non-Union Actors and Real People in a series of PSA’s for a Nonprofit Healthcare Organization.

I am looking for a wide variety of people from all walks of life 18+!

I will also be happy to see Union actors and make sure I have them in my database!!

I offer “boutique” casting services to my clients.  I do all the casting personally.

I am an actor and director and establishing relationships with actors and directors is very important to me.

Seeing an actor in person is so important and I am excited to have this opportunity!!

See you there!!

Big Thanks to Tai Bacani for welcoming me!! 

🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉

✨BIG NEWS, FILM FRIENDS ✨

We’re switching things up for our next WIFVNE Brew Networking Night… and you are going to LOVE it.

📍 New Location: Shannon View Inn
🍻 Same amazing community
🎬 Even MORE opportunity

We are SO excited to share that Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be joining us LIVE for an in-person open call for actors 🎭

Yes… you read that right.
Come ready. Come confident. Come as YOU.

items.summary:
Please join me on Wednesday, May 20, 2026 from 3:30 to 6:00 for Women in Film & Video New England
monthly meeting where I will be holding an Open Call for Actors!

I am currently casting Non-Union Actors and Real People in a series of PSA’s for a Nonprofit Healthcare Organization.

I am looking for a wide variety of people from all walks of life 18+!

I will also be happy to see Union actors and make sure I have them in my database!!

I offer “boutique” casting services to my clients.  I do all the casting personally.

I am an actor and director and establishing relationships with actors and directors is very important to me.

Seeing an actor in person is so important and I am excited to have this opportunity!!

See you there!!

Big Thanks to Tai Bacani for welcoming me!! 

🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉

✨BIG NEWS, FILM FRIENDS ✨

We’re switching things up for our next WIFVNE Brew Networking Night… and you are going to LOVE it.

📍 New Location: Shannon View Inn
🍻 Same amazing community
🎬 Even MORE opportunity

We are SO excited to share that Jodi Purdy Casting Director will be joining us LIVE for an in-person open call for actors 🎭

Yes… you read that right.
Come ready. Come confident. Come as YOU.

Whether you’re an actor, filmmaker, writer, or just looking to connect with creative, like-minded people—this is your night.

Let’s build, collaborate, and create magic together 💫
